text:
function_response_content = (
                                            f"[Error: Unknown guideline '{guideline}'. Allowed guidelines: {', '.join(allowed)}.]"
                                        )
                                    else:
                                        current_paths = _get_current_faiss_paths(
                                            faiss_node_key=faiss_node_key_for_chat,
                                            node_map_payload=node_map_to_use,
                                            chat_history_payload=chat_history_to_use,
                                        )
                                        current_set = {_canonicalize_faiss_path(p) for p in current_paths}
                                        norm_add = _canonicalize_faiss_path(path_to_add)

                                        updated_paths = list(current_paths)
                                        added = False
                                        if norm_add not in current_set:
                                            updated_paths.append(path_to_add)
                                            added = True

                                        _set_faiss_paths(
                                            faiss_node_key=faiss_node_key_for_chat,
                                            selected_paths=updated_paths,
                                            node_map_payload=node_map_to_use,
                                            chat_history_payload=chat_history_to_use,
                                        )

                                        if added:
                                            refresh_context_after_tools = True
                                            yield _sse_event(
                                                "faiss_selection_update",
                                                {
                                                    "chat_id": chat_id_to_save,
                                                    "node_key": node_key,
                                                    "faiss_node_key": faiss_node_key_for_chat,
                                                    "selected_paths": updated_paths,
                                                },
                                            )

                                        loaded_names = get_active_guideline_names(node_key, node_map_to_use, chat_history_to_use)
                                        loaded_str = ", ".join(loaded_names) if loaded_names else "(none)"
                                        function_response_content = (
                                            f"Guideline selection updated. Added: {canonical_label if added else 'none (already loaded)'}."
                                            f" Now loaded: {loaded_str}."
                                        )
                            except Exception as tool_exec_err:
                                function_response_content = f"[Error executing tool {function_name}: {tool_exec_err}]"
                                yield _sse_event("assistant_chunk", {"content": f"\n*{function_response_content}*\n", "node_key": node_key, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save})
                        else:
                            function_to_call = available_functions_map.get(function_name)
                            if function_to_call:
                                try:
                                    function_response_content = function_to_call(**function_args)

                                    # Specialized UI messages for calculators
                                    def _emit_calc(display_type: str, payload: dict):
                                        calc_id = f"calc_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}"
                                        payload["calculationId"] = calc_id
                                        new_msg = {
                                            "role": "assistant",
                                            "prompt": None,
                                            "response": None,
                                            "display_type": display_type,
                                            "tool_data": payload,
                                        }
                                        target_message_list.append(new_msg)
                                        new_index = len(target_message_list) - 1
                                        yield _sse_event(
                                            "tool_message",
                                            {
                                                "msg_index": new_index,
                                                "chat_id": chat_id_to_save,
                                                "node_key": node_key,
                                                "role": "assistant",
                                                "display_type": display_type,
                                                "tool_data": payload,
                                            },
                                        )

                                    if function_name == "mortgage_calculator" and isinstance(function_response_content, dict):
                                        yield from _emit_calc("loan_calculator_icon", function_response_content)
                                    elif function_name == "dti_calculator" and isinstance(function_response_content, dict):
                                        yield from _emit_calc("dti_calculator_icon", function_response_content)
                                    elif function_name == "cow_calculator" and isinstance(function_response_content, dict):
                                        yield from _emit_calc("cow_calculator_icon", function_response_content)
                                    elif function_name == "income_avg_calculator" and isinstance(function_response_content, dict):
                                        yield from _emit_calc("income_avg_calculator_icon", function_response_content)
                                    elif function_name == "cash_calculator" and isinstance(function_response_content, dict):
                                        yield from _emit_calc("cash_calculator_icon", function_response_content)
                                    else:
                                        yield _sse_event("assistant_chunk", {"content": f"*Result: {function_response_content}*\n", "node_key": node_key, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save})

                                except Exception as tool_exec_err:
                                    function_response_content = f"[Error executing tool {function_name}: {tool_exec_err}]"
                                    yield _sse_event("assistant_chunk", {"content": f"\n*{function_response_content}*\n", "node_key": node_key, "msg_index": msg_index, "chat_id": chat_id_to_save})

                        tool_results_for_next_call.append({"role": "tool", "tool_call_id": tool_call_id, "name": function_name, "content": str(function_response_content)})
                        tool_results_for_history.append({"tool_call_id": tool_call_id, "response": str(function_response_content)})

                    if 0 <= msg_index < len(target_message_list):
                        target_message_list[msg_index].setdefault("tool_results", []).extend(tool_results_for_history)
                    messages_for_api.extend(tool_results_for_next_call)

                    if refresh_context_after_tools:
                        try:
                            temp_history_for_context = chat_history_to_use.copy()
                            temp_history_for_context.pop(node_key, None)
                            refreshed_context, refreshed_context_details = assemble_full_context_and_retrieve(
                                user_id,
                                user_message,
                                node_key,
                                node_map_to_use,
                                temp_history_for_context,
                                loan_details_table=(st.get("loan_details_table") if st else None),
                                return_details=True,
                                context_type=(st.get("context_type") if st else None),
                                pipeline_metadata=(st.get("pipeline_metadata") if st else None),
                            )
                            refreshed_guidelines = get_active_guideline_names(node_key, node_map_to_use, chat_history_to_use)
                            refreshed_guideline_document_citations = _extract_guideline_document_citations(
                                refreshed_context_details
                            )
